items.title: Phase 7: Agent Registration UI + Promotion Timeline
items.description: Build React component for registering new agents and visualizing L0-L5 promotion timeline with real-time level/risk updates. Integrate with Agent Trust Profiles panel for seamless onboarding UI.

items.title: Phase 7: Mission Replay + Historical Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Add time-travel replay of mission execution events, confidence progression timeline, gate decision history, and performance metrics (tokens/tools/wall-time per phase). Enable post-incident analysis and trend detection.

items.title: Tech Debt: WebSocket Load Balancing + Event Persistence
items.description: Current WebSocket (Phase 6.5) scales to single server. Add Redis pub/sub for multi-instance horizontal scaling and event history persistence for replay capability. Required before production multi-instance deployment.

items.title: Tech Debt: Authentication + RBAC for Multi-User Support
items.description: Add JWT-based auth to Console API and WebSocket. Implement role-based access control (admin/reviewer/executor). Scope mission visibility and bead permissions per user. Required for team environments.

items.title: Improvement: Automated Test Pyramid Validation in Confidence Magnet
items.description: Extend ConfidenceMagnet to validate test pyramid compliance per level (unit/integration/e2e ratio). Emit warnings when ratios deviate from standard. Helps catch test imbalance before confidence score alone would flag it.

items.title: Improvement: Extensible Magnet Plugin Framework
items.description: Refactor Magnets to use plugin interface so custom magnets (domain-specific, security-specific, cost-optimized) can be registered at runtime without modifying core classes.
